scripts.check: node --check app.js && node --check i18n.js && node --check worker/src/index.js && node --check worker/src/lists.js && node --check worker/src/curated.js && node scripts/validate-moodwatch.mjs && node scripts/verify-ids.mjs
scripts.deploy:worker: npm run check && cd worker && set -a && . ~/.config/wrangler/.env && set +a && npx wrangler deploy
